import pytest
import sys

@pytest.mark.skip
def test_feature_not_ready():
    pass

@pytest.mark.skipif(sys.platform == "win32")
def test_linux_only():
    pass

@pytest.mark.skip
def test_waiting_for_api():
    pass

def test_normal():
    assert True

@pytest.mark.skipif(sys.version_info < (3, 12))
def test_requires_312():
    pass
